naming: fix: resolve N PR review items from SOURCE (PR #411 RX)

Nullish coalescing on array access in computeTrend
FP threshold NaN guard in check-pattern-compliance.js

batches.deferred_summary: 15 CC (v1 legacy + health checker branching), 22 regex DoS hotspots (internal scripts, trusted input), 16 PATH hotspots (FP on hardcoded execFileSync in tests), 4 useless-assignment in Semgrep test fixtures, 11 CodeQL pre-existing

fixes: security-check.js SKIP_PATTERNS applied in --file mode (CI fix)

5 new Semgrep test cases for guard patterns
batches.rejected_summary: 3 Qodo repeat-rejected (same as R1/R2), 12 Semgrep no-unchecked-array-access FPs (all had existing guards: early returns, split()[0], ?? fallbacks, ?.)

process.description: Batched PR review protocol for large PRs
steps: 1. Read this file to recover state after compaction
2. User pastes next batch of review feedback OR fetch via API
3. Triage: identify fixes vs deferred vs rejected. Check against prior rounds for duplicates.
4. Fix items (use parallel agents for 10+ items across multiple files)
6. Commit with: fix: resolve N PR review items from SOURCE (PR #411 RX)
7. Update this state file with round results
8. After final round: write learning entry (#442+), JSONL record, push all
known_fps: Semgrep no-floating-promise: rule rewritten in R1, old FPs should not recur
CodeQL 11 alerts: pre-existing initial scan, not PR-specific
SonarCloud PATH hotspots (S4036): FP on hardcoded execFileSync in tests
SonarCloud useless-assignment in tests/semgrep/: intentional test fixtures
SonarCloud duplication on v1 scripts: by design (legacy fallbacks)
Qodo path-validation + health-tests: fixed in R1, Qodo re-raises across rounds
Qodo FP-threshold-NaN: fixed in R2, Qodo re-raises in R4
Semgrep no-unchecked-array-access: rule too strict, expanded in R4

notes: R4 committed (acea73c5), not yet pushed. 3 Qodo items repeat-rejected (same R1/R2 fixes). 15 Semgrep FPs resolved by expanding rule guard patterns. CI security-check --file mode now applies SKIP_PATTERNS.
